query:
SELECT r.id, r.customerName, r.status, r.orderCount, r.allocatedCount, r.skippedCount, r.createdAt FROM allocation_runs r ORDER BY r.createdAt DESC LIMIT 3;
SELECT o.runId, o.orderId, o.referenceNum, o.status, o.skipReason FROM allocation_run_orders o WHERE o.runId = (SELECT id FROM allocation_runs ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 1);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4NCq8mAsshAuKGA.2865343ca485 --database K5ogkLhSXtccCnqH4Vm3fs --execute SELECT r.id, r.customerName, r.status, r.orderCount, r.allocatedCount, r.skippedCount, r.createdAt FROM allocation_runs r ORDER BY r.createdAt DESC LIMIT 3;
SELECT o.runId, o.orderId, o.referenceNum, o.status, o.skipReason FROM allocation_run_orders o WHERE o.runId = (SELECT id FROM allocation_runs ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 1);
